pokemon:walking-wake.name: Walking Wake
pokemon:walking-wake.summary: This ferocious creature is shrouded in mystery. It's named after an aquatic monster mentioned in an old expedition journal.
expansionNotes: Competitive, encounter, and media coverage can be expanded later without changing the page contract.

pokedexEntries.text: This ferocious creature is shrouded in mystery. It's named after an aquatic monster mentioned in an old expedition journal.
It resembles an illustration published in a paranormal magazine, said to be a depiction of a super-ancient Suicune.

competitiveSummary: Competitive notes are pending a richer source import.
loreSummary: This ferocious creature is shrouded in mystery. It's named after an aquatic monster mentioned in an old expedition journal.

form:walking-wake.name: Walking Wake
form:walking-wake.summary: Walking Wake form with Water / Dragon typing.
expansionNotes: Location and breeding metadata can be expanded with a fuller encounter import.
breedingNotes: Breeding notes are pending a richer source import.
